title: Unsanctioned Magic
description: Reports have reached the Arcane Circle of a rogue mage practicing forbidden magic near Millbrook. The guild cannot tolerate unsanctioned practitioners, especially those dabbling in dangerous arts. Track down this rogue mage and bring them to justice - or help them see the error of their ways.

objectives.description: Question townspeople about the rogue mage
objectives.notes: Innkeeper has seen strange lights in the woods

objectives.description: Locate the rogue mage's hideout in the forest
Confront the rogue mage (Combat or Persuasion)
objectives.notes: Can fight or persuade them to stop (skill check DC 15)

objectives.description: Report the outcome to Archmage Elara

notes: Second Apprentice quest. Moral choice: kill or persuade. Different flags based on player choice. Rewards ice spell.
